case_title: LEE, WEYMAN vs. DOE, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-23-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OR ON FOR WITHDRAWL OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL BY MOTION OR SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY.
